notes: Phone/iPad UI fixes (2026-06). (1) iPhone simple fullscreen: iPhone Safari has no Fullscreen API, so the ⛶ button now toggles an 'immersive' mode that hides the viewer's own top chrome (topbar / camera row / perf badge) to maximise the 3D view, with a floating ⤢ exit button; the real Fullscreen API is still used on iPad/Android. Button shows on phones regardless of API support. (2) iPhone portrait top UI on ONE line: the 🖥 perf badge now flows inline at the camera row's right end (reset/record/AR + badge = ~287px, fits ≥320px) instead of wrapping to a 2nd line. (3) iPad: tap no longer zooms the toolbar — added touch-action:manipulation directly on the toolbar buttons (root-level value didn't reliably stop iOS double-tap-zoom on the buttons) plus -webkit-text-size-adjust:100%. (4) iPad bottom tool bar (cbar) centred in the free space between the joystick/▲▼ (or expanded layer panel) and the right edge via max(--lp-width,296px). Builds on v0.0.11.
